title: Blue Smurf Trader
description: Changes the texture of the default Goblin Trader (from Goblin Traders) to the blue smurf cat.
body:
Re-texture of the default goblin trader from the mod **Goblin Traders** to look like the mystical blue smurf cat. Tested on forge and fabric.

*Requires one of these mods and its dependencies:*

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goblin-traders
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goblin-traders-fabric
https://modrinth.com/mod/goblin-traders-fabric
